description_long: This is a pair of medium-sized scissors featuring blue plastic handles with white inner linings, designed for comfortable grip. The handles are ergonomically shaped, with one loop slightly larger than the other to accommodate different finger sizes. The blades are metallic, straight, and taper to a rounded tip, suggesting a safety-oriented design suitable for general use. The joint connecting the blades is a visible metal rivet, providing a secure and smooth pivot action. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the plastic handles seamlessly molded around the metal blade tangs. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of blue-handled scissors with white inner grips and straight, rounded-tip metal blades. The ergonomic handles and safety blade tips make them suitable for everyday cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue handles with white inner linings and the rounded blade tips facing forward.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slim, straight metal blades and the flat alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handles and the full width of the blade tips.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the other side of the handles and blades, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Ergonomic, asymmetrical handles with blue plastic exterior and white inner lining, designed for right-handed use; handles are not padded but have a contoured grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible metal rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two oval finger loops, one larger than the other, with smooth white inner surfaces for comfort; designed to fit thumb and multiple fingers.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Rounded safety tips, suitable for general and safe cutting tasks.
